passive.name: Rising Spell Force
passive.description: Ezreal gains increasing Attack Speed each time he successfully hits a spell, stacking up to 5 times.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Ezreal}} abilities generate stacks of ''Rising Spell Force'' for each enemy hit, up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Rising Spell Force:}} For each stack, '''Ezreal''' gains {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Ezreal''' generates a [[stack]] of ''Rising Spell Force'' for each enemy hit by his [[champion ability|abilities]], lasting for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits, and stacking up to 5 times.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Rising Spell Force:}} For each stack, '''Ezreal''' gains {{sti|as|{{as|10% '''bonus''' attack speed}}}}, up to a maximum of {{as|50%|attack speed}}.
wiki_detail.notes: * ''Rising Spell Force'' will stack even if the abilities hit were blocked by {{tip|spell shield|spell shields}}.

Q.name: Mystic Shot
Q.description: Ezreal fires a damaging bolt of energy which reduces all of his cooldowns slightly if it strikes an enemy unit.
Q.tooltip: Ezreal fires a bolt of energy, dealing {{ damage }} physical damage to the first enemy hit and reducing his Ability Cooldowns by {{ cdrefund }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ezreal}} fires a bolt of energy that deals {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the bolt hits an enemy, all of '''Ezreal's''' ability cooldowns are {{sti|cdr|reduced}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ezreal''' fires a bolt of energy in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy hit and applies {{tip|on-hit}} and {{tip|on-attack}} effects at 100% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.description2: If ''Mystic Shot'' successfully hits an enemy, the {{sti|'''current''' cooldowns}} of '''Ezreal's''' abilities, including ''Mystic Shot's'', are reduced by {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Mystic Shot'' deals {{tip|basic damage}}, but also triggers spell effects by dealing an additional 0 {{tip|spell damage}}.
* ''Mystic Shot'' benefits from [[life steal]], [[omnivamp]], and [[physical vamp]], but not [[spell vamp]].
* Even if the ability is blocked by {{tip|spell shield}} it will still trigger the cooldown reduction.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* ''Mystic Shot'' will be buffered and cast when the cooldown ends if the player attempts to cast it within {{fd|0.05}} seconds of the cooldown ending.

W.name: Essence Flux
W.description: Ezreal fires an orb that sticks to the first champion or objective hit. If Ezreal hits an enemy with the orb, it detonates and deals damage.
W.tooltip: Ezreal fires a magical orb that sticks to the first champion, structure, or epic jungle monster hit for {{ detonationtimeout }} seconds. If Ezreal hits that target with an Attack or Ability, it detonates, dealing {{ damage }} magic damage. Detonating with an Ability refunds the Mana cost of that Ability plus {{ manareturn }} Mana.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ezreal}} fires an orb that shortly marks the first enemy {{tip|champion}}, epic {{tip|monster}}, or {{tip|turret|structure}} hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: His next attack or ability on the target detonates the mark, dealing {{as|magic damage}}. If the mark was detonated by an ability, '''Ezreal''' restores {{as|{{sti|mana}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ezreal''' fires an orb in the target direction that marks the first enemy {{tip|champion}}, epic {{tip|monster}}, or [[structures|structure]] hit for 4 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: His next [[basic attack]] or [[champion ability|ability]] against the target detonates the mark to deal them {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Bonus Magic Damage|{{ap|80 to 300}} {{as|(+ 100% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|70 to 90}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: If the mark was detonated with an ability, '''Ezreal''' restores {{sti|mana|{{as|60 mana}}}} plus the {{as|mana cost}} of that ability.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The application of ''Essence Flux'' deals 0 {{tip|proc damage}}.
** This triggers [[combat status|in-combat]] effects such as drawing turret aggro and drawing [[Monster#Monster_Behavior|monster aggression]].
** It also triggers {{ri|Sudden Impact}} and applies {{ii|Elixir of Sorcery}}.
** It does not trigger {{ri|Cheap Shot}}, however, as {{tip|proc damage}} doesn't trigger {{ri|Cheap Shot}}.
* {{tip|Block}} and {{tip|Dodge}} prevents the mark from being triggered by a basic attack.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} prevents the mark from being triggered by an ability. If the mark is triggered by a basic attack, spell shield will prevent ''Essence Flux's'' damage.
{{Effect at cast time end}}

E.name: Arcane Shift
E.description: Ezreal teleports to a target nearby location and fires a homing bolt which strikes the nearest enemy unit. Prioritizes enemies stuck with Essence Flux.
E.tooltip: Ezreal teleports then fires a bolt at the nearest enemy, dealing {{ damage }} magic damage. The bolt prioritizes enemies affected by Essence Flux.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ezreal}} {{tip|blinks}} to the target location and fires a bolt that strikes the nearest enemy, dealing {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ezreal''' {{tip|blinks}} from his current location to up to 475 units towards the target location, then fires a homing bolt towards the nearest enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|standard sight|reveals}} them for 1 second.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Arcane Shift'' prioritizes firing at the nearest enemy marked by ''{{ai|Essence Flux|Ezreal}}''.
wiki_detail.description3: ''The target does not have to be {{tip|sight|visible}} to be hit by this ability. Arcane Shift will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* If '''Ezreal''' is moved during the cast time, his range to blink will update accordingly. This does not exceed the maximum target range.
* The target is revealed as soon as '''Ezreal''' fires the missile at them.

R.name: Trueshot Barrage
R.description: Ezreal winds up before firing a powerful barrage of energy that deals massive damage to each unit it passes through (damage is reduced for minions and non-epic monsters).
R.tooltip: Ezreal fires a massive energy arc that deals {{ damage }} magic damage. The arc deals {{ damagereductionwaveclear.0*100 }}% damage to minions and non-epic jungle monsters.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ezreal}} winds up to fire a powerful bolt of energy that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ezreal''' fires an arc of energy in the target direction that briefly grants {{tip|sight}} of its surroundings and deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Trueshot Barrage's'' projectile has an [[File:Trueshot Barrage Minimap.png|40px|link=]] icon on the mini-map while it is in flight. It can be seen by only '''Ezreal''' and his allies.
{{Effect at cast time start}}
